title: Lin-gang Special Area Works with ShoreVest Partners
permissionStatus: pending — metadata-only archive stub; awaiting ShoreVest-supplied source material
summary: The Lin-gang Special Area Administration announced a strategic cooperation agreement with ShoreVest Partners and highlighted the firm’s QFLP approval and investment platform in China.
